provider_or_recipients: OpenAI realtime, transcription, and review services configured by Mparanza
trigger: The user asks Clara to create or operate an external-participant hosted interview; creating the participant link is the route choice.

data_sent.when: When the preparer authenticates or requests a magic link
data_sent.content: Authorized email address and redirect path for magic-link requests, or a Mparanza session cookie or consumed magic link

data_sent.when: When creating a participant link from a registered campaign
data_sent.content: Exact campaign identifier, non-sensitive case identifier, participant name, language, participant role, and requested expiry

Campaign and case identifiers; case, project, participant and interview labels; role and language; purpose, participant introduction, background context, hypotheses, topics, questions, red flags, boundaries, and expiry

data_sent.when: When the participant opens the bearer link and completes the interview
data_sent.content: Participant microphone audio and answers, conversation events, and service-generated transcript and review material

data_returned.content: Bearer participant URL, expiry, campaign identifier, and preparation receipt

data_returned.when: When checking a known participant link
data_returned.content: Minimal status plus case name and interview title exposed by the unauthenticated status route

data_returned.when: After authenticated retrieval of a completed interview
data_returned.content: Prepared record, completion data, current-run events, transcript material, media metadata, and generated quality review; the documented JSON bundle contains no raw audio or video bytes

access.arrangement: An authenticated preparer creates and retrieves interviews. The participant uses an expiring bearer link without login. A known bearer token can read minimal public status, including case name and interview title; bundle and review retrieval use the authenticated helper. Mparanza and OpenAI process audio, answers, and transcript to conduct, transcribe, and review the interview.
controls: The remote helper accepts only HTTPS mparanza.com or www.mparanza.com outside local tests.
Cookie headers are attached only to the approved origin.
Briefs and receipts containing bearer material are written as local 0600 files.
Participant-visible and public-status fields are required to be non-sensitive by the workflow.

retention.statement: The hosted interview record remains stored until manual or administrative deletion. Participant-link expiry, revocation, or archiving is not deletion.

security_controls.control: Bearer URLs and tokens are kept out of ordinary command arguments, shell history, source files, and normal logs.
